name_cn:
Genuine quality
Latest counter version, 9K glass stone crystal chain, color💋5BA251#🆕new crystal chain diamond bag❤️using top-grade imported CIoquel soft sheepskin, classic embossed small flower, detachable metal crystal chain and leather long crossbody strap, same-color metal logo on front, satin lining, round double handle wrist strap, magnetic closure inside, phone pockets on both sides, shoulder or crossbody, looks amazing on🌹size: 20 X16 X11 (with original box)
